description: tradbotv6 v6.2 - Engineering Modernization: Standardize on ESM, implement SQLite persistence, and enhance UI error reporting.

userStories.title: Convert codebase to ES Modules (ESM)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to use standard ESM (import/export) across all files so that the codebase is modern and tool-friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: Update all files to use ESM syntax instead of CommonJS
All smoke tests in tests/ pass using ESM

userStories.title: Migrate trade state to SQLite
userStories.description: As a user, I want trades to be stored in a reliable database instead of JSON files to prevent corruption and improve performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Include better-sqlite3 or equivalent lightweight DB
Initialize trades.db and migrate schema from fcb_trades.json
Update bot.js and bridge.js to use SQLite for persistence

userStories.title: Centralized UI Error Notification System
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see clear, actionable errors in the dashboard when bot operations fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a toast or banner notification component to index.html
Hook into bridge API results to display errors visually
Verify error reporting for 'Unauthorized' and 'Write APIs Locked'
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
